# Part 1 — Home (Agent Brief)

**Restaurant:** SAIGON DISTRICT KITCHEN AND BAR  
**Language:** English only  
**Style:** Match [Eclipse di Luna](https://www.eclipsediluna.com/) — no emoji, no decorative icons  
**Your folder:** `part-1-home/` only — do not edit `part-2-visit/` or `part-3-connect/`  
**Read-only:** `shared/assets/brand/logo.jpg` (for Header)

---

## Assets (provided — use these paths)

| Path | Source |
|------|--------|
| `shared/assets/brand/logo.jpg` | root `logo.jpg` |
| `part-1-home/assets/hero/hero-background.jpg` | root `background.jpg` |

Reference site uses a **video** hero; use `hero-background.jpg` with the same full-bleed cover layout.

---

## Your scope

Build the **homepage** (`/`) and the **canonical site shell** (Header, Footer, Gift Card modal, design tokens).

---

## Shared Contract (required)

### Header
- Logo image: `shared/assets/brand/logo.jpg`
- Alt text: SAIGON DISTRICT KITCHEN AND BAR
- Nav: Menu · Location · Birthday Party · Contact · Blog
- CTA: Gift Card

### Footer
- Our Restaurant: Menu · Entertainment · Gift Card
- More: Birthday Party · Jobs · Blog · Contact Us
- Address: 4500 Satellite Blvd #1180, Duluth, GA 30096
- Phone: (678) 404-7383
- Email: parisbanhmiatl.info@gmail.com

### Gift Card modal
- Title: *A Gift Everyone Will Enjoy*
- Buy a Gift Card button (placeholder link `#`)

### Design tokens
- Dark hero backgrounds, serif headings, sans body, warm accent color, ~1200px max width

---

## Home page sections

1. **Hero** — full-bleed `assets/hero/hero-background.jpg`, headline, *RESTAURANT & BAR*, CTA Menu → `/menu`
2. **Brand story** — Vietnamese cuisine, 2–3 sentences, CTA Menu
3. **Gift card promo** — headline, copy, Buy a Gift Card
4. **Our location** — one card with address, phone, links to Menu and `/location`
5. **Services** — Birthday Party, Gift Card cards
6. **Reviews** — carousel with placeholder quotes
7. **Instagram** — handle + image grid placeholders
8. **Footer**

---

## Assets

| Path | Status |
|------|--------|
| `shared/assets/brand/logo.jpg` | **Provided** |
| `part-1-home/assets/hero/hero-background.jpg` | **Provided** |
| Review / Instagram placeholders | TBD |

---

## Deliverables

- Working preview of `/` inside `part-1-home/`
- Header, Footer, GiftCard modal, tokens file — structured so they can move to `shared/` later

---

## Out of scope

- Menu, Location, Birthday Party, Contact, Jobs, Blog pages
- Newsletter, reservations, order online, deals, catering
